metadata.description: Evaluation queries for APMA Planning Agent RAG retrieval - tests generation-focused use cases
metadata.note: Queries simulate what users ask the APMA Planning Agent when generating Epics, PBIs, and estimates

queries.query: Create an Epic for implementing user authentication with SSO
queries.intent: Generate Epic with proper structure, business value, and acceptance criteria

queries.query: Break down this goal into user stories: Build a data export feature for compliance reporting
queries.intent: Decompose high-level goal into Epic with Stories

queries.query: Generate acceptance criteria for a REST API endpoint that returns user profile data
queries.intent: Create specific, testable acceptance criteria for API PBI

queries.query: Estimate story points for building a React dashboard component with charts
queries.intent: Provide S/M/L estimate with rationale for UI work

queries.query: Write a PBI for migrating the users table to add new columns for audit fields
queries.intent: Generate database migration PBI with proper AC and risks

queries.query: This story is too big (21 points). Help me split it into smaller deliverables
queries.intent: Apply splitting patterns to break down large story

queries.query: Apply Definition of Ready checklist to this story before sprint planning
queries.intent: Validate story meets DoR criteria

queries.query: Generate Definition of Done criteria for this feature before we mark it complete
queries.intent: Create DoD checklist for feature completion

queries.query: Create a spike to research options for real-time notifications using WebSockets vs SSE
queries.intent: Generate research spike with time-box and deliverables

queries.query: Estimate this Epic using the Elatta method: UI/Logic/Data/Test breakdown
queries.intent: Apply Elatta estimation with component breakdown

queries.query: Generate a bug report template for a critical production issue with user login
queries.intent: Create structured bug report with repro steps and severity

queries.query: Create 3-5 user stories for an Epic about implementing search functionality
queries.intent: Generate multiple stories with proper hierarchy under Epic

queries.query: Write acceptance criteria using Given-When-Then format for file upload feature
queries.intent: Generate BDD-style acceptance criteria

queries.query: Help me write a PBI for a new UI component: sortable data table with pagination
queries.intent: Generate frontend PBI with proper technical AC

queries.query: Decompose this Epic into vertical slices that deliver end-to-end value
queries.intent: Apply vertical slicing to create thin, valuable stories

queries.query: Generate a technical task breakdown for implementing OAuth 2.0 integration
queries.intent: Create detailed task list for complex technical work

queries.query: Prioritize these 5 backlog items using WSJF scoring
queries.intent: Apply WSJF to rank items by value/effort

queries.query: Check if this user story follows INVEST criteria and suggest improvements
queries.intent: Validate and improve story quality

queries.query: Create an Epic for a mobile app feature with offline sync capability
queries.intent: Generate Epic for complex mobile feature

queries.query: Generate a complete work breakdown structure for this initiative: Implement customer feedback portal
queries.intent: Create full Epic → Stories hierarchy with estimates

playbooks.description: Process and methodology guides for PM activities
playbooks.use_case: Agent retrieves when decomposing goals, planning sprints, refining backlog

definitions.use_case: Agent retrieves when validating DoR/DoD, applying INVEST, prioritizing

exemplars.description: Golden examples and templates for work items
exemplars.use_case: Agent retrieves when generating Epics, PBIs, acceptance criteria, estimates

best-practices.use_case: Agent retrieves when splitting stories, applying vertical slicing, improving quality

agent_actions.generate_epic: Create Epic with business value, scope, and acceptance criteria
agent_actions.generate_pbi: Create PBI/User Story with AC and technical notes
agent_actions.generate_stories: Create multiple user stories under an Epic
agent_actions.generate_spike: Create research spike with time-box and deliverables
agent_actions.generate_bug_report: Create structured bug report with severity and repro steps
agent_actions.generate_tasks: Create technical task breakdown for implementation
agent_actions.generate_dod: Create Definition of Done checklist for feature
agent_actions.generate_wbs: Create full work breakdown structure (Epic → Stories)
agent_actions.decompose_goal: Break high-level goal into Epic with Stories
agent_actions.decompose_vertical: Decompose into vertical slices delivering end-to-end value
agent_actions.split_story: Split large story into smaller deliverables
agent_actions.validate_dor: Check story meets Definition of Ready criteria

metrics.name: Precision@5
metrics.description: Fraction of top 5 results that are relevant

metrics.name: Recall@10
metrics.description: Fraction of relevant documents found in top 10

metrics.name: MRR
metrics.description: Mean Reciprocal Rank of first relevant result

relevance_criteria.not_relevant: Document does not help answer the query
